summary: Comprehensive testing of Sophie Lamour life coaching website completed successfully. All core functionality working including French/English language toggle, admin panel, blog management, contact forms, and responsive design.

fixed_issues.issue: KeyError: 'id' when creating blog posts - user object used 'id' instead of '_id'
fixed_issues.fix_applied: Changed user['id'] to user['_id'] in create_blog_post function

design_issues.issue: Default emergent.sh meta description instead of Sophie Lamour specific content

passed_tests: Home page hero section and service cards
Individual service pages (Personnel, Professionnel, Parentalité, Home Organising)
Admin dashboard with tabs (blog, testimonials, contact)
Blog post creation through admin interface
Proper font usage (serif for headings, sans-serif for body)

success_percentage.frontend: 95% (all major functionality working, minor meta description issue)

action_item_for_main_agent: Update meta description tags to be Sophie Lamour specific instead of default emergent.sh content. All core functionality is working perfectly.
